chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 508 of 2019 CP D 1832 of 2020 CP D 714 of 2022 CP D 8084 of 2022 CP D 8085 of 2022 CP D 3034 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 08.05.2025 Messrs. Haider Waheed, Junaid Ahmed, Shahmeer Memon, Muhammad Naqash, Anas Makhdoom, Imdad Ali Sahito, Ahmed Hussain and Jibran Ali, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Zeeshan Adhi, Additional Advocate General along with Mr. M.B. Asher, advocate Per learned counsel these petitions are pressed to the extent of the respective show cause notices issued to the petitioners. Learned counsel state that the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. It is sought that each notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the relevant petitioner and pending the same no coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel further state that they may remain at liberty to agitate their claim in respect of vires in any other proceedings as and when warranted / instructed. These petitions have been pending since 2019 onwards with stay orders and no cavil is articulated for disposing of the same in the manner as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
